# The Contracting Preacher

> Pastor McKnight — The Contracting Preacher — helps small businesses in South Carolina and nationwide win federal government contracts. SAM registration, bid writing, 8(a) certification, proposal preparation, and more.

## Services

- SAM.gov Registration & Renewal — Starting at $497
- Bid & Proposal Writing — Starting at $1,497
- SBA 8(a) Certification — Starting at $2,497
- HUBZone Certification — Starting at $1,997
- WOSB/EDWOSB Certification — Starting at $1,497
- SDVOSB/VOSB Certification — Starting at $1,497
